emails.subject: Where are You???????????
emails.body: Where are You??????????? Yao!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Where are you? Have you been kidnapped by rebels in Nigeria? Or have you just found other friends besides your "friends" in the Swap Group--oh, yea, and one "friend" at EBS. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net

emails.subject: Re: Where are You???????????
emails.body: Re: Where are You??????????? Hi Marie and Tana, Believe it or not, you are both right.There is no way any friend is going to come between my friends in the Swap team and at EBS and me. I was definitely with Kofi. In the bushes, trying to resolve some real trying issues. And the two beautiful babes on my arms? My gorgeous friends, Tana and Marie. Wishes, wishes,and more wishes. A guy can't get any luckier. I was in Anfoeta Gbogame over the weekend, doing my loin cloth thing. I am back in Accra today, and will be here until Wednesday. I will then be back in my village for a few days to attend my dad's burial. I miss you all. I am looking forward to seeing you soon. Yao
